title: Kitchen Perfected 1500W Single Hotplate / Cast Iron / Variable Heat Settings / Overheat Protection / Corrosion Resistant / Power Indicator / Non Slip Feet / Easy Clean - Polished Steel - E4103SS
features: VARIABLE HEAT SETTINGS: Thermostatically controlled heat settings, providing different cooking options.

DURABLE & EASY TO CLEAN: made from stainless steel body and cast iron plate, it is perfect for camping and travelling as it can be easily moved around and is made to last. Its shape and design also means it is easier to clean.

SAFETY FEATURES: Overheat protection, this device will automatically power off if it reaches too high of a temperature, to stop any accidents before they occur. This hotplate also has non-slip rubber feet, meaning it won't slide and move as it is used, or as it is cooling down.
POWER INDICATOR: A neon power indicator is featured at the front of this hotplate, indicating that the hotplate is on and hot.
MADE TO LAST: This hotplate is corrosion resistant, it won't rust or corrode easily due to being a cast iron hotplate and stainless steel body.
description: The KitchenPerfected 1500W Single Hotplate has variable heat settings, giving a range of different cooking and warming options. It is made from a stainless steel base and a cast iron plate, perfect for camping and travelling, as it can be easily moved around and is made to last. Its shape and design also means it is easier to clean. This hotplate has an overheat protection, meaning it will automatically power off if it reaches too high of a temperature, to stop any accidents before they occur. Featuring non slip rubber feet, it will not slide and move as it is used or in transit/cooling down. A neon power indicator is also featured at the front of the hotplate, giving indication that the hotplate is on and hot. This hotplate is corrosion resistant, it won't rust or corrode easily due to being a cast iron hotplate and stainless steel body. Box Includes: 1 x KitchenPerfected 1500W Single Hotplate 1 x Instruction Manual
